reviews.review_msg: Ashley is very knowledgeable and teaches in such down to-earth manner and made dreadful 8 am classes perhaps the best class I've taken this semester. On the side note, I can see how some people in my class felt uncomfortable as Ashley does tend to swear a lot and I see him connecting better with younger students. All in all, he is a fantastic prof.

Currently teaching at Sheridan College.  He provided real world examples, relevant course material + additional material he took the time to create.  Interesting test questions, but overall a good teacher

All his examples are real life example from his on experience. Not only are they funny, they are completely related to the concepts he is talking about thereby making them easy to understand. All in all, he made a boring course based on memorizing, fun.

AWESOME prof. super laid back and chill. you can tell he really enjoys the material. gives alot of examples that help you understand the material. very fair exams. lots of opportunities to get marks. very entertaining class. study and memorize the material & you'll do great!

Very interesting and funny to relate real life examples to explain slides. TA is also nice. However, multiple choice can be ambiguous and he only takes direct textbook ideas for written. You'll be lucky to get couple marks trying to explain in your own words. So it seems easy, but scores are low and marking really tough, even for tutorial projects.
He's an outgoing and nice guy, however I think his short answer questions on the midterm were EXTREMELY vague. Basically, if you memorize the textbook, you'll do great in this class.

Ashley Bennington is a bad prof, he is very arrogant and thinks he is better than everyone else especially the people he works with. He rants about his own stories in class trying to relate to the topics but during the exams, does not accept any words other than the ones used in the text book. Simply encourages students to be booksmart.

Really entertaining prof! Lectures are interesting and worth attending. His assignments and tests are fair. You will do well as long as you studied a bit. The curve can pull you down sometimes, but overall great prof!

He is a great prof, classes are entertaining so you are never bored in his class. Shows alot of interest in what he is teaching, the only problem is the curve which can mess u up. Other than that great prof and would like to take a class with him again
Lectures are often highly entertaining though sometimes unprofessional. He is easy to get along with and very approachable.

Very funny, approachable and helpful. If you have to take OB, Ashley is the one you should definitely consider first. He makes otherwise very boring materials interesting. I truly enjoyed his lectures because I have learned a lot and he told us many real life cases which are fascinating.

Ashley is an awesome prof with great interest in the material and great knowledge. MT and Final were fair and easy if you know your concepts. He is also very young which makes him easy to relate to. Overall, the class was one of the only classes I looked forward to going to, even though it was a night class. If you can, definately take his section!

He is an excellent prof. The exam is easy, except for the open-ended part in which he cannot control the difficulty. Very approachable, very HR-like. Lectures are interesting and funny, and he uses real-life examples to interpret course contents!

Ashley changed my university education. He is the only porfessor that I have ever witnessed have such an interest in the things he teaches with giving you a sense of what it is like in the real job market. He swears to keep the idiots in class awake and not make it sound like he's just reading off the notes...not to seem like he's cool. Great class
Great Prof.
Awesome!
The class is pretty easy. His lecture notes helps with studying for exams. Try to get him as your TA as well. Really easy going guy.
Hes good, young and has a lot of experience in the workforce
awesome prof. funny guy. makes the course interesting. he doesnt swear too much... or at all now that i think of it
awesome and really funny

Ashley was a great professor. I had him as a TA in BUS 381 two years ago and he has gotten even better. I had him for BUS 481 summer 2007. I would definitely recommend him for any HR class. He talk fast because he has allot to say. The assignments were relevant to my job and I applied the material right away.

Ashley is a great prof. teaches textbook and real life information about the course. He  does not cram anything. Midterm was quite straight-forward as he outlined very clearly the format and content covered. Take this class with him!
Awesome prof. Lectures are not just from book; teaches you about the real workplace and stuff.

Avoid his class.  He talks all lecture and talks fast.  30% for participation, yet there is no opportunity to contribute.  He swears way too much, maybe he thinks its cool?  No feedback on work, in fact we had only been given a mark for an assignment worth 10% of our mark before the 13th week.  Group project is massive and crammed at the very end.

Ashley is the most helpful prof I've ever had. Never met a prof who wanted to see his students succeed the way Ashley does. He even helped us with our resumes! Assignments were actually practical (e.g. actual workforce planning & analysis, and mock interviews to practice our skills) and he gave freely of his time to help us. Thanks Ashley!
